name: PER_EVENT_PROCESS_STAGE_DETAIL
description: This table is used to store the event process stage details during Person synchronization process.

columns.Name: EVENT_PROCESS_STAGE_DETAIL_ID
columns.Comments: The enterprise for which this responsibility applies. Allow multi-tenancy customers.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: EVENT_PROCESS_STAGE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to the PER_EVENT_PROCESS_STAGE table

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person ID for which the event has to be raised.

columns.Name: EVENT_RAISE_DATE
columns.Comments: Date on which the event should be raised.

columns.Name: EVENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of the event. valid values  "INSERT", "UPDATE"

columns.Name: SOURCE_OBJECT_NAME
columns.Comments: Source Object Name which fired the event.

columns.Name: CHANGED_PERSON_DETAILS_FLAG
columns.Comments: This flag identifies whether "Changed Person Details Event" should be raised or not.

columns.Name: CHANGED_KEYWORDS_FLAG
columns.Comments: This flag identifies whether "Changed keywords" should be raised or not.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: PERSON_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Number assigned to the person, to identify the person uniquely in any context, not dependent on being an employee, contingent worker, etc.
